text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I'm walking past a pet shop, when...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, these poor, hapless souls! How I wish to
protect them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki is staring at some cute animals with
an anguished expression.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That kitten and puppy... How full of unbridled
innocence their wide eyes are.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No doubt they lack the power to survive on their
own, much unlike their wild counterparts...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But don't you worry... My art, the Kongo Yaegaki
style of fighting, exists to protect the weak and
the innocent!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I shall guard this store as your protector until all
of you find your rightful masters...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Did... Did you witness all of that just now?
choice_data_list:
You looked like you were undergoing harsh
training just now.
So you also have a silly side, eh?
So you also have a silly side, eh?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Did... Did you witness all of that just now?
choice_data_list:
You looked like you were undergoing harsh
training just now.
So you also have a silly side, eh?
So you also have a silly side, eh?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Training! Yes! I was doing just that!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I was strengthening my resolve by allowing my
emotions to run rampant!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It is a brutal and painful method, but it is all a
part of my martial arts training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Yaeno Muteki stands there, sweat glistening
on her brow, she does seem quite formidable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki runs off and veers around the
corner of the street with unparalleled skill.
